coreJobStatement: Provide leasable nonresidential building space to tenant organizations while maintaining regulatory-compliant safety infrastructure and preserving long-term asset value.

l6Systems.name: Property Acquisition
l6Systems.jobFamily: Identify and capitalize commercial real estate assets for the portfolio

l6Systems.name: Asset Preparation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Prepare building systems and access points for occupant use

l6Systems.name: Tenant Acquisition
l6Systems.jobFamily: Market vacancies, qualify tenants, and execute lease agreements

l6Systems.name: Building Operations
l6Systems.jobFamily: Operate and maintain physical building systems for continuous safe occupancy

l6Systems.name: Tenant Services
l6Systems.jobFamily: Service active tenants, manage obligations, handle renewals and exits

vnUnits.name: Commercial Valuation Analytics
vnUnits.functionalJob: Model property value using discounted cash flow, comparable sales, and market analytics to support acquisition and disposition decisions

alternatives.name: 1. Enterprise ARGUS/MSCI (~45%) · 2. CoStar Analytics (~25%) · 3. Custom Excel/DCF model (~30%)

vnUnits.name: Due Diligence Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Organize, share, and track legal, environmental, and financial due diligence documents during property acquisition

alternatives.name: 1. SaaS VDR platforms (Datasite, Intralinks) (~55%) · 2. Legal matter management software (~25%) · 3. General document management (~20%)

vnUnits.name: Building Mechanical Systems
vnUnits.functionalJob: Provide heating, cooling, and ventilation to maintain occupant comfort and code-compliant indoor air quality across all tenant spaces

alternatives.name: 1. Integrated HVAC (central chiller/AHU plant) (~50%) · 2. VRF/split systems (~30%) · 3. District cooling/heating (~20%)

vnUnits.name: Electrical Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: Distribute reliable electrical power from utility intake to tenant floors with metering for billing allocation and emergency backup capability

alternatives.name: 1. Standard LV distribution (~70%) · 2. Smart metering w/ sub-tenant allocation (~20%) · 3. Microgrid/on-site generation (~10%)

vnUnits.name: Lease Management Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manage the full lease lifecycle from abstraction and execution through rent roll management, renewals, and tenant billing

alternatives.name: 1. Enterprise IWMS (Yardi, MRI, RealPage) (~55%) · 2. Mid-market property management SaaS (~30%) · 3. Spreadsheet/legacy (~15% declining)

vnUnits.name: CRE Listing & Marketing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Market available commercial spaces to prospective tenants through listing platforms, broker networks, and direct outreach

alternatives.name: 1. CoStar/LoopNet (~50%) · 2. JLL/CBRE broker portal (~30%) · 3. Own website / direct (~20%)

vnUnits.name: Building Management System (BMS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Centrally monitor and control HVAC, lighting, and building utilities to maintain safe and efficient operating conditions for all tenants

alternatives.name: 1. Integrated BMS platform (Siemens Desigo, JCI Metasys, Honeywell EBI) (~50%) · 2. Point solutions / standalone HVAC+lighting controls (~30%) · 3. Cloud-native BMS/BAS SaaS (~20% growing)

vnUnits.name: Fire Detection & Alarm
vnUnits.functionalJob: Detect fire conditions across all building zones and notify occupants and emergency services to enable safe evacuation per local fire code

alternatives.name: 1. Addressable fire alarm systems (~55%) · 2. Conventional fire alarm panels (legacy, ~30%) · 3. Wireless fire detection systems (~15% growing)

vnUnits.name: Emergency Exit Security ← Türwächter L5
vnUnits.functionalJob: Secure emergency exit doors against unauthorized use and propping while preserving single-motion escape and reporting door status to building management

alternatives.name: 1. Mechanical door alarm guards, no connectivity (~40%) · 2. Wireless IoT exit alarm guards (~20%) ← Türwächter category · 3. Wired electronic exit control, alarm-panel-integrated (~25%) · 4. Integrated alarmed panic hardware (~15%)
alternatives.source: No published sub-segment data; expert inference from access control market structure

vnUnits.name: Access Control
vnUnits.functionalJob: Control and log tenant and visitor access to building entrances, floors, and restricted areas through credential-based door authorization

alternatives.name: 1. Mobile credential / cloud ACaaS (~40% growing) · 2. Smart card / proximity card (~35%) · 3. PIN keypad entry (~15%) · 4. Traditional mechanical key (~10% declining)

vnUnits.name: Tenant Experience Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Provide tenants with a digital interface for service requests, building information, amenity booking, and communication with property management

alternatives.name: 1. Dedicated PropTech tenancy apps (Equiem, HqO) (~35%) · 2. BMS-integrated dashboard (~30%) · 3. Email/portal-based self-service (~35%)
alternatives.source: PropTech adoption surveys; >70% of institutional RE firms use such platforms [[SRC: IMARC/Coherent 2025]]

vnUnits.name: Fire Safety Inspection Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Schedule, execute, and document periodic fire safety inspections of alarms, extinguishers, exit hardware, and sprinklers to maintain regulatory compliance

alternatives.name: 1. Integrated FM compliance platform (ServiceNow, Corrigo) (~40%) · 2. Standalone inspection software (~25%) · 3. Paper-based / spreadsheet logs (~35% declining)
alternatives.source: Industry observation; compliance management market trends

vnUnits.name: Property Accounting Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manage rent collection, operating expense allocation, NOI reporting, and financial accounting for the property portfolio

alternatives.name: 1. Yardi Voyager / MRI Financial (~60%) · 2. SAP/Oracle RE modules (~20%) · 3. General-purpose accounting (QuickBooks, Xero) (~20%)
